arts.ttl: Man City's forgotten man could make return at Arsenal after huge Pep Guardiola backing
arts.sum: Oscar Bobb is reportedly closing in on a return to action and is attempting to show Manchester City boss Pep Guardiola he is ready for his comeback against Arsenal at the Emirates this weekend

arts.ttl: Aston Villa's rivals know they are vulnerable - do not be surprised if Arsenal bid again for Ollie Watkins, writes TOM COLLOMOSSE... with three other stars also attracting interest
arts.sum: TOM COLLOMOSSE: Villa are vulnerable. It may not look that way, as they look ahead to the Champions League knockout rounds and continue to perform strongly under Unai Emery.

arts.ttl: Champions League draw: Who could Liverpool Arsenal, Manchester City, Aston Villa face in the round of 16?
arts.sum: Premier League sides now know who they can face in the next round of the Champions League following the conclusion of the league phase of the competition on Wednesday.

arts.ttl: Can Arsenal win the Champions League?
arts.sum: Former Arsenal forward Theo Walcott discusses his old club's chances of winning the Champions League this season.

arts.ttl: Ollie Watkins breaks silence amid Arsenal transfer links with 'special' Aston Villa message
arts.sum: Aston Villa striker Ollie Watkins has spoken out for the first time since reports of Arsenal's opening offer being rejected emerged. Reports have stated that Villa turned the bid down from the Gunners but another offer is anticipated before the January transfer window closes on Monday night.

arts.ttl: Unai Emery sends Arsenal clear transfer message over Ollie Watkins move
arts.sum: Watkins was the subject of a January bid from Arsenal earlier in the week and though Villa rejected it, he was in Emery's starting XI just hours after the news broke. And of course some can leave, but it is not time to speak about this." On Watkins, he added: "I know you want to ask, I repeat what I told you: today is not the day."

arts.ttl: Mikel Arteta responds to Arsenal transfer bid for Ollie Watkins as Aston Villa stance clear
arts.sum: Mikel Arteta has subtly suggested that Arsenal are in pursuit of Aston Villa's Ollie Watkins following the news that the Gunners submitted a rejected £60million offer for the striker. Arsenal's initial approach for the English forward was rebuffed by Villa, who have reportedly takenissue with the timing of the bid which landed just before their crucial Champions League clash with Celtic on Wednesday.

All the goals came in the first half, and Arnaut Danjuma gave the hosts a surprise lead against the run of play, but we turned things around with two goals in four minutes thanks to a Jorginho penalty and a fine Ethan Nwaneri effort. Raheem Sterling missed a penalty deep into second-half stoppage-time, but enough had been done to secure our sixth win from eight matches in the competition this term to finish only behind Liverpool and Barcelona, and allow us the chance to watch what happens in the play-off round next month from afar.

arts.ttl: Can Arsenal win the Champions League?
arts.sum: Former Arsenal forward Theo Walcott discusses his old club's chances of winning the Champions League this season.

arts.ttl: Arsenal sent new Ollie Watkins transfer update with Aston Villa to be 'demanding' over striker
arts.sum: Gunners have made a shock late swoop for England striker and boyhood fan before Monday’s deadline
